core_principles: High data density with breathing room

usage.primary_action: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all
usage.secondary_action: bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:text-gray-900 shadow-sm
usage.surface_card: bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-xl hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
usage.status_badge_success: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium
usage.status_badge_warning: bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium
usage.status_badge_error: bg-red-50 text-red-700 border border-red-200 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium
usage.status_badge_neutral: bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 border border-gray-200 rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium

cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden
cards.header: px-6 py-4 border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/50 flex items-center justify-between

buttons.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

key_elements: Live Call Status (Top Priority - Large Card)
Recent Activity Feed (Sidebar or Bottom Row)

contact_list.features: Bulk Actions, Search, Filter by Status

assets.logo_placeholder: Use a simple geometric shape (e.g., a blue square with rounded corners) + Text 'ColdCall.ai'

universal_guidelines: Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings (h1-h3) to give a strong, professional look.
Use 'Inter' for body text for maximum readability.
Avoid gradients for backgrounds; use solid colors or very subtle patterns.
Ensure high contrast for text (WCAG AA).
All interactive elements must have hover and active states.
Use Skeleton loaders for data fetching states.
Do not use generic 'Lorem Ipsum' - use realistic sales data (e.g., 'Tech Corp', 'John Doe', '$5,000 Deal').

image_urls.note: Since external image search failed, use these placeholder strategies:
image_urls.company_logos: Use UI Avatars API with initials: https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=Company+Name&rounded=true&background=random
image_urls.empty_states: Use Lucide Icons with large size and gray color (e.g., <PhoneOff className='w-16 h-16 text-gray-300' />)
